description:
This fragment contains several legal documents in the hand of a single scribe. 

Upside down on verso: a complaint by the judge Yaʾir b. Avraham b. Yaʾir against Shelomo b. Avraham. Together they jointly owned precious stones, flax, and other agricultural products grown in Dammūh. Shelomo went against their established agreement and brought Yaʾir before a Muslim court, ultimately resulting in Yaʾir taking losses. Location: Fusṭāṭ. Dated: 3 Tammuz 1390 = 6 June 1079 CE. (Information from Goitein's index card.) 

Other documents on this fragment: a trousseau document (1079 CE), documents in settlement of business matters, and a power of attorney (1074 CE).
description_he: הקטע מכיל מספר מסמכים משפטיים בכתב סופר אחד. בגב, הפוך: תלונת השופט יאיר ב' אברהם נגד שלמה ב' אברהם בנוגע לנכסים משותפים. מתוארך 3 תמוז 1390 = 6 יוני 1079. גם מסמך נדוניה, הסדרי עסקים ויפוי כח.
